majors.description: The counsel of a Diviner is sought by those who want a clearer understanding of the past, present, and future. As a Diviner, you strive to part the veils of space, time, and consciousness.

features.name: Divination Savant
features.description: Choose two Wizard spells from Divination school (no higher than level 2), add to spellbook for free. Whenever you gain access to a new level of spell slots, add one Divination school spell to spellbook for free.

features.name: Portent
features.description: Whenever you finish a Long Rest, roll two d20s and record numbers. Replace any d20 Test made by you or creature you can see with one of these foretelling rolls. Choose before the roll, only once per turn. Each foretelling roll can be used only once.

features.name: Expert Divination
features.description: When you cast a Divination spell using a level 2+ spell slot, you regain one expended spell slot. The slot must be lower than the slot you expended and can't be higher than level 5.

features.name: The Third Eye
features.description: Bonus Action, choose one benefit until start of Short or Long Rest: Darkvision (120 feet), Greater Comprehension (read any language), See Invisibility (cast without spell slot).

features.name: Greater Portent
features.description: Roll three d20s for Portent feature rather than two.

majors.name: Evoker
majors.subtitle: Create Explosive Elemental Effects
majors.description: Your studies focus on magic that creates powerful elemental effects such as bitter cold, searing flame, rolling thunder, crackling lightning, and burning acid.

features.name: Evocation Savant
features.description: Choose two Wizard spells from Evocation school (no higher than level 2), add to spellbook for free. Whenever you gain access to a new level of spell slots, add one Evocation school spell to spellbook for free.

features.name: Potent Cantrip
features.description: When you cast a cantrip at a creature and miss with attack roll or target succeeds on saving throw, the target takes half the cantrip's damage (if any) but suffers no additional effect.

features.name: Soulstitch Spells
features.description: When you cast an Evocation spell that affects other creatures you can see, choose a number equal to 1 + spell's level. Chosen creatures automatically succeed on saving throws, and take no damage if they would normally take half damage on a successful save.

features.name: Empowered Evocation
features.description: Whenever you cast a Wizard spell from Evocation school, add your Intelligence modifier to one damage roll of that spell.

features.name: Overchannel
features.description: When you cast a Wizard spell with spell slot of levels 1-5 that deals damage, you can deal maximum damage with that spell on the turn you cast it. First time: no adverse effect. If used again before Long Rest, take 2d12 Necrotic damage per level of spell slot immediately after casting. This damage ignores Resistance and Immunity. Each additional use increases Necrotic damage per spell level by 1d12.

majors.name: Illusionist
majors.subtitle: Weave Subtle Spells of Deception
majors.description: You specialize in magic that dazzles the senses and tricks the mind, and the illusions you craft make the impossible seem real.

features.name: Illusion Savant
features.description: Choose two Wizard spells from Illusion school (no higher than level 2), add to spellbook for free. Whenever you gain access to a new level of spell slots, add one Illusion school spell to spellbook for free.

features.name: Improved Illusions
features.description: Cast Illusion spells without Verbal components. If an Illusion spell has range of 10+ feet, range increases by 60 feet. You know Minor Illusion cantrip. If already know it, learn a different Wizard cantrip. Can create both sound and image with single casting of Minor Illusion, and cast as Bonus Action.

features.name: Phantasmal Creatures
features.description: Always have Summon Beast and Summon Fey prepared. Whenever you cast either spell, you can change its school to Illusion (summoned creature appears spectral). Cast Illusion version of each without spell slot, but casting without slot halves creature's HP. Once per Long Rest.

features.name: Illusory Self
features.description: When a creature hits you with an attack roll, take Reaction to interpose an illusory duplicate between attacker and yourself. Attack automatically misses, then illusion dissipates. Once per Short or Long Rest (or expend level 2+ spell slot to restore).

features.name: Illusory Reality
features.description: When you cast an Illusion spell with a spell slot, choose one inanimate, nonmagical object that is part of the illusion and make it real. Bonus Action while spell is ongoing. Object remains real for 1 minute, can't deal damage or give any conditions.

multiclassing.core_traits_gained: Hit Point Die from the Core Wizard Traits table.
